name: jaldrishti-api
description: JalDrishti IBM Cloud Functions API — MIS 78th Round Water Analytics with IBM Granite RAG

scripts.deploy: ibmcloud fn action update jaldrishti/getStateStats index.js --kind nodejs:16 --web true --param-file .env.json
scripts.deploy:rag: ibmcloud fn action update jaldrishti/getNLQuery index.js --kind nodejs:16 --web true --memory 512 --param-file .env.json

notes.rag_handler: rag_handler.js uses watsonx.ai REST APIs directly (no extra npm packages needed — only axios). IBM Granite and Slate embeddings are called via HTTPS.
